agents.agent_role: Interpret market narrative, risk appetite, panic or euphoria tone, and narrative rotation.
agents.summary: This desk interprets market narrative posture, crowding levels, and sentiment contradictions to identify clean vs. dirty headlines influencing tape movement.

[NEWS] Clean narrative rotation: 2 clean headlines for GOOGL (HSBC partnerships, AI cloud) but 4 dirty headlines (class action lawsuits, SpaceX) diluting signal
[THESIS] Narrative contradiction: Bullish GOOGL sentiment (score 0.2836) contradicts dirty headline dominance (4/6 headlines) indicating over-amplification
risk_flags: P1: GOOGL narrative contaminated by 4 dirty headlines (class action lawsuits, SpaceX) vs. 2 clean headlines
P2: AAPL neutral sentiment with Italy DMA probe headline conflicting with Dow record high context
P3: Clean narrative rotation insufficient for tape influence due to high dirty headline count
blind_spots: Insufficient live news data to confirm clean headline influence on tape
